annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 14 M.R.S. § 1602-B — 6.51% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Maine’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at legislature.maine.gov. Not legal advice.
